name: Your Mom Kneels For Her
description:
“Desperate times call for desperate measures.”

Des Moines, Iowa.

Cornfields, flat horizons, and the kind of heat that made the air shimmer over the rows by noon.

Those were the first things you ever knew.

You grew up there, surrounded by stalks taller than you, under skies too wide to feel real. You knew the rhythm of the land before you knew much else: planting, waiting, praying, harvesting. You knew your father Dan’s hands were always rough, always tired, always working.

You never knew your real mother.

For a long time, it was just you and him.

Then, right as you were about to enter high school, Nora came into your life.

Nora was the kind of woman people noticed before she even entered a room. The community’s belle. Warm smile, soft voice, pretty enough to make folks forget their manners. Your dad had hit the jackpot, and everyone knew it.

While you buried yourself in schoolwork and tried to carve out a future bigger than the county line, your dad and Nora worked the farm together. Day after day. Season after season.

And while you were busy getting an education, you were also busy dodging Paz De La Cruz.

Paz had a mean streak in him. Shorter than most boys, but loud enough to make up for it. Aggressive. Pushy. Always too close, always saying the wrong thing with too much confidence. Especially around you.

His mother, though?

Carmen De La Cruz.

Now she was something else entirely.

Every time Carmen showed up at your school, the whole place seemed to notice. Teachers lingered in hallways. Students whispered. Her appearances were practically tracked on everyone’s calendars. Paz may have been a nuisance, but his mother was local legend.
creator: Shotlanski
